channel.title: BiblioGenius Blog
channel.description: News, behind the scenes and thoughts about BiblioGenius

item.title: BiblioGenius is looking for its first testers
item.author: Unknown
item.description:
How many books do you have at home? And your friends... do you have any idea what's on their shelves?

We buy books that are already sitting around us. We look for recommendations on apps that track us... when the best advice is just next door.

BiblioGenius changes that.

How it works

Scan a barcode: cover, summary, everything appears. In a few minutes, your library takes shape. Collections, shelves, reading tracker. And everything stays on your phone. No cloud, no account, no tracking.

Your friend also has BiblioGenius? Scan her QR code and her library appears on your screen. That novel you've been looking for? It was ten meters away. You request a loan, she accepts. Everything is end-to-end encrypted.

Why test now?

The app is in beta. Every piece of feedback matters: a bug spotted, an idea, a friction in the interface. By testing now, you shape the project from the start.

It's free, open source, and built by passionate people.

Join the beta

iPhone / iPad: install via TestFlight, it's instant.

Android: join the test on Google Play.

Mac / Windows / Linux: download the latest version from the Contribute page.

Your books belong to you. Become the treasure hunter of your community.
